nasb.text: ‘I know your deeds, that you are neither cold nor hot; I wish that you were cold or hot.

esv.text: “‘I know your works: you are neither cold nor hot.     Would that you were either cold or hot!

cnv.text: 我知道你的行為，你不冷也不熱；我巴不得你或冷或熱。

ccb.text: ‘我知道你的行为，你不冷也不热。我情愿你或冷或热，

csbs.text: 我知道你的行为，你既不冷也不热；我真希望你或冷或热。
